jobs.title: Indian Railway Catering and Tourism Corporation Limited Hospitality Monitor Recruitment 2026 -
jobs.how_to_apply: Candidates are requested to fill out the application form (attached to this notification) correctly in all respects. The completed application form must be submitted along with original documents, a set of attested copies of the required documents, and two recent passport-sized photographs at the interview venue for verification. An interview will be conducted, and candidates will be shortlisted based on their credentials and performance in the personal interview. Eligible candidates will be offered engagement based on merit and the number of vacancies, after verification of their records.

jobs.jobs_info: Charkhi Dadri Safai Karmchari Vacancy 2026: Applications are invited for the vacant post of Safai Karmchari in Gram Panchayat Baund Kalan. The applicant must be a resident of the same village. If, in any case, a sufficient number of people are not available in a particular village for the cleaning work, then permission will also be given to employ a resident of a nearby village under the scheme. The applicant, whether male or female, must be physically capable and healthy and should be between 18 and 55 years of age. The applicant can submit his/her application on any working day at the Block Development and Panchayat Officer Office, Baund, from 18.05.2026 to 01.06.2026 (office hours: 09:00 AM to 05:00 PM).
